arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal Makes Champions League History With Goal vs. Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal became the first player to score multiple Champions League knockout phase goals before turning 18.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal: Hansi Flick offers latest update after Barcelona injury scare
arts.sum: Teenage sensation was replaced by Ansu Fati during the latter stages of Champions League demolition against Borussia Dortmund

arts.ttl: Flick offers Yamal update after Barca star asked to be replaced
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick confirmed that Lamine Yamal is fine after signalling to come off late on in the 4-0 win over Dortmund . When you play like this, you usually score goals.

arts.ttl: MOTM Poll: Borussia Dortmund Outplayed by Hansi Flick’s Barcelona
arts.sum: I actually think that BVB deserved a goal after some strong minutes late on, but it simply wasn’t to be. Barcelona would probably have had at least one more goal if not for Gregor Kobel’s very strong saves in the first half.

arts.ttl: Raphinha equals incredible Lionel Messi record to leave Barcelona on the brink
arts.sum: Barcelona thrashed Borussia Dortmund 4-0 in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie as former Leeds star Raphinha continued his phenomenal campaign

arts.ttl: Five players who could join Barcelona this summer
arts.sum: Nico Williams has been Barcelona’s priority transfer target for the past 12 months and they are still eager to finalise an agreement with the Athletic Club star, despite the impressive form of Raphinha. If Barcelona are unable to sign Williams or Neymar, they are expected to pursue a move for Liverpool winger Luis Diaz .

arts.ttl: Barcelona raid Premier League for ANOTHER free transfer
arts.sum: Barcelona are raiding the free transfer market again ahead of next summer, with Hansi Flick lining up Arsenal star Thomas Partey . According to Mundo Deportivo, Barcelona are considering a contract offer for soon-to-be free agent Partey.

arts.ttl: Imperious Barcelona thrash Borussia Dortmund in statement performance
arts.sum: Barcelona 4-0 Borussia Dortmund: Robert Lewandowski struck twice against his former club in a big first-leg win

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides Lamine Yamal injury update after Barcelona 4-0 Dortmund
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an update on the wellbeing of attacking starlet Lamine Yamal. This comes after Lamine set pulses racing across the Blaugrana fanbase late in…

arts.ttl: Barcelona fans show their support after forgotten Ansu Fati’s return vs Dortmund
arts.sum: The home crowd in attendance at Barcelona’s Champions League meeting with Borussia Dortmund on Wednesday made clear their support and appreciation for a somewhat forgotten member of the club’s frontline.…
